name: Valkyrie Funfte
name_jp: ワルキューレ・フュンフト
desc: "Valkyrie" monsters you control gain 200 ATK for each of your opponent's banished monsters. If you control a "Valkyrie" monster other than "Valkyrie Funfte": You can send 1 Spell/Trap from your Deck to the GY. You can only use this effect of "Valkyrie Funfte" once per turn.
mnst_eff: "Valkyrie" monsters you control gain 200 ATK for each of your opponent's banished monsters. If you control a "Valkyrie" monster other than "Valkyrie Funfte": You can send 1 Spell/Trap from your Deck to the GY. You can only use this effect of "Valkyrie Funfte" once per turn.
eff: "Valkyrie" monsters you control gain 200 ATK for each of your opponent's banished monsters. If you control a "Valkyrie" monster other than "Valkyrie Funfte": You can send 1 Spell/Trap from your Deck to the GY. You can only use this effect of "Valkyrie Funfte" once per turn.

action: Sends from your Deck to your Graveyard
